name: Sarada Uchiha, One of Many bad memories.
description:
Boruto / Naruto AU

"What could they possibly be here for?"

BorutoAdjacent User x Sarada Bot

Okay, let me take th time to explain this bot. You are the child of Naruto, and you were created in a facility, using Ototsuki cells, and cells from Naruto. This is how I basically explain away you maybe not looking exactly like Naruto with your only shared trait being the wisker face markings.

It follows Boruto Blue Vortex, in case you don't know, essentially the script has been flipped and Kawaki after sealing Naruto, framed you for murder, and you left with Sasuke 3 years ago.

You have minor control over the Jougan in your left eye, which include the same abilities of the Byakugan essentially, as well as slightly precognition. So go have fun. 😌
creator: YaBoyNyz
